use_cases: Decorative animated visual for landing pages and hero sections
Creative ASCII art display for developer portfolios and portfolios
Background animation for creative/coding community platforms
Novel loading state or empty state animation
Educational demonstration of 3D projection and rotation math
ai_summary: An animated ASCII trefoil knot rendered in React that continuously rotates in 3D space. The component uses ASCII characters to create a text-based 3D visual effect with an optional color mode that paints tube segments in a vibrant palette. Originally from 21st.dev's community component library, this serves as a creative, minimalist visual element suitable for portfolios, landing pages, or as a decorative animation in creative tool applications.
